message:
refactor(model): extract shared MoE block module

Phase 2: Create moe_block.zig with shared MoE expert dispatch
- Add MoEEngine vtable interface for expert FFN encoding
- Add TensorLoader interface for Q4K tensor offset lookup
- Add encodeExpertWithAutoSource() for auto Q2K/Q4K dispatch
- Add encodeMoEBlock() implementing zero+experts+residual pattern
- Add buildMoEParams() helper for param construction

Integration:
- moe_metal.zig: Add asMoEEngine() vtable implementation
- mixtral_lazy.zig: Add asTensorLoader() vtable implementation
- forwardTrueSingleSubmit: Now uses shared MoE block (~85 lines → ~17 lines)

The shared MoE block automatically handles:
- Q2K hybrid mode (RAM-resident via ExpertCache + CSR corrections)
- Q4K streaming mode (SSD mmap via buffer cache)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,298 @@
+//! Shared MoE Block
+//!
+//! Implements the MoE expert loop pattern used across forward variants:
+//! 1. Zero output accumulator
+//! 2. For each expert: Load buffers + encode FFN
+//! 3. Residual add
+//!
+//! Supports two expert sources:
+//! - Q2K Hybrid: RAM-resident via ExpertCache with CSR sparse corrections
+//! - Q4K Streaming: SSD mmap via buffer cache
+//!
+//! This module eliminates ~100 lines of duplicated MoE code across forward functions.
+
+const std = @import("std");
+const objc = @import("../inference/metal/objc.zig");
+
+const log = std.log.scoped(.moe_block);
+
+/// Parameters for encoding a complete MoE block
+pub const MoEBlockParams = struct {
+    layer_idx: u32,
+    n_embd: u32,
+    n_ff: u32,
+    buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_output: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_residual: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_expert_weights: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    experts: [2]u32,
+};
+
+/// Interface for the Metal engine operations needed by MoE block
+pub const MoEEngine = struct {
+    ptr: *anyopaque,
+    vtable: *const VTable,
+
+    pub const VTable = struct {
+        encodeZeroBuffer: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, buf: objc.MTLBuffer, n: u32) anyerror!void,
+        encodeAdd: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, a: objc.MTLBuffer, b: objc.MTLBuffer, out: objc.MTLBuffer, n: u32) anyerror!void,
+        encodeExpertFFN_Q2K_HybridFromSoftmax: *const fn (
+            ptr: *anyopaque,
+            cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer,
+            buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            gate_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            up_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            down_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            buf_output: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            buf_expert_weights: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            expert_idx: u32,
+            layer_idx: u32,
+            n_embd: u32,
+            n_ff: u32,
+        ) anyerror!void,
+        encodeExpertFFN_Q4_BufferFromSoftmax: *const fn (
+            ptr: *anyopaque,
+            cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer,
+            buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            gate_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            up_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            down_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            buf_output: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            buf_expert_weights: objc.MTLBuffer,
+            expert_idx: u32,
+            n_embd: u32,
+            n_ff: u32,
+        ) anyerror!void,
+        getOrCreateHybridQ2KBuffer: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, name: []const u8) anyerror!objc.MTLBuffer,
+        getOrCreateTensorBuffer: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, name: []const u8, offset: u64, size: u64) anyerror!objc.MTLBuffer,
+        isHybridMode: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque) bool,
+    };
+
+    pub fn encodeZeroBuffer(self: MoEEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, buf: objc.MTLBuffer, n: u32) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeZeroBuffer(self.ptr, cmd_buf, buf, n);
+    }
+
+    pub fn encodeAdd(self: MoEEngine, cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer, a: objc.MTLBuffer, b: objc.MTLBuffer, out: objc.MTLBuffer, n: u32) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeAdd(self.ptr, cmd_buf, a, b, out, n);
+    }
+
+    pub fn encodeExpertFFN_Q2K_HybridFromSoftmax(
+        self: MoEEngine,
+        cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer,
+        buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        gate_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        up_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        down_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        buf_output: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        buf_expert_weights: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        expert_idx: u32,
+        layer_idx: u32,
+        n_embd: u32,
+        n_ff: u32,
+    ) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeExpertFFN_Q2K_HybridFromSoftmax(
+            self.ptr,
+            cmd_buf,
+            buf_normed,
+            gate_buf,
+            up_buf,
+            down_buf,
+            buf_output,
+            buf_expert_weights,
+            expert_idx,
+            layer_idx,
+            n_embd,
+            n_ff,
+        );
+    }
+
+    pub fn encodeExpertFFN_Q4_BufferFromSoftmax(
+        self: MoEEngine,
+        cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer,
+        buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        gate_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        up_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        down_buf: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        buf_output: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        buf_expert_weights: objc.MTLBuffer,
+        expert_idx: u32,
+        n_embd: u32,
+        n_ff: u32,
+    ) !void {
+        return self.vtable.encodeExpertFFN_Q4_BufferFromSoftmax(
+            self.ptr,
+            cmd_buf,
+            buf_normed,
+            gate_buf,
+            up_buf,
+            down_buf,
+            buf_output,
+            buf_expert_weights,
+            expert_idx,
+            n_embd,
+            n_ff,
+        );
+    }
+
+    pub fn getOrCreateHybridQ2KBuffer(self: MoEEngine, name: []const u8) !objc.MTLBuffer {
+        return self.vtable.getOrCreateHybridQ2KBuffer(self.ptr, name);
+    }
+
+    pub fn getOrCreateTensorBuffer(self: MoEEngine, name: []const u8, offset: u64, size: u64) !objc.MTLBuffer {
+        return self.vtable.getOrCreateTensorBuffer(self.ptr, name, offset, size);
+    }
+
+    pub fn isHybridMode(self: MoEEngine) bool {
+        return self.vtable.isHybridMode(self.ptr);
+    }
+};
+
+/// Tensor offset and size information
+pub const TensorInfo = struct {
+    offset: u64,
+    size: usize,
+};
+
+/// Loader interface for Q4K tensor offset lookup
+pub const TensorLoader = struct {
+    ptr: *anyopaque,
+    vtable: *const VTable,
+
+    pub const VTable = struct {
+        getTensorOffsetAndSize: *const fn (ptr: *anyopaque, name: []const u8) ?TensorInfo,
+    };
+
+    pub fn getTensorOffsetAndSize(self: TensorLoader, name: []const u8) ?TensorInfo {
+        return self.vtable.getTensorOffsetAndSize(self.ptr, name);
+    }
+};
+
+/// Encode a single expert FFN with automatic source detection (Q2K hybrid vs Q4K streaming)
+///
+/// This handles buffer acquisition and kernel dispatch for both modes.
+pub fn encodeExpertWithAutoSource(
+    engine: MoEEngine,
+    loader: TensorLoader,
+    cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer,
+    layer_idx: u32,
+    expert_idx: u32,
+    n_embd: u32,
+    n_ff: u32,
+    buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_output: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_expert_weights: objc.MTLBuffer,
+) !void {
+    var name_buf: [128]u8 = undefined;
+
+    if (engine.isHybridMode()) {
+        // Q2K HYBRID PATH: All tensors from Q2K file via ExpertCache (RAM)
+        const gate_name = try std.fmt.bufPrint(&name_buf, "blk.{}.ffn_gate.{}.weight", .{ layer_idx, expert_idx });
+        const gate_buf = try engine.getOrCreateHybridQ2KBuffer(gate_name);
+
+        const up_name = try std.fmt.bufPrint(&name_buf, "blk.{}.ffn_up.{}.weight", .{ layer_idx, expert_idx });
+        const up_buf = try engine.getOrCreateHybridQ2KBuffer(up_name);
+
+        const down_name = try std.fmt.bufPrint(&name_buf, "blk.{}.ffn_down.{}.weight", .{ layer_idx, expert_idx });
+        const down_buf = try engine.getOrCreateHybridQ2KBuffer(down_name);
+
+        try engine.encodeExpertFFN_Q2K_HybridFromSoftmax(
+            cmd_buf,
+            buf_normed,
+            gate_buf,
+            up_buf,
+            down_buf,
+            buf_output,
+            buf_expert_weights,
+            expert_idx,
+            layer_idx,
+            n_embd,
+            n_ff,
+        );
+    } else {
+        // Q4K STREAMING PATH: Tensors from SSD via buffer cache
+        const gate_name = try std.fmt.bufPrint(&name_buf, "blk.{}.ffn_gate.{}.weight", .{ layer_idx, expert_idx });
+        const gate_info = loader.getTensorOffsetAndSize(gate_name) orelse return error.TensorNotFound;
+        const gate_buf = try engine.getOrCreateTensorBuffer(gate_name, gate_info.offset, gate_info.size);
+
+        const up_name = try std.fmt.bufPrint(&name_buf, "blk.{}.ffn_up.{}.weight", .{ layer_idx, expert_idx });
+        const up_info = loader.getTensorOffsetAndSize(up_name) orelse return error.TensorNotFound;
+        const up_buf = try engine.getOrCreateTensorBuffer(up_name, up_info.offset, up_info.size);
+
+        const down_name = try std.fmt.bufPrint(&name_buf, "blk.{}.ffn_down.{}.weight", .{ layer_idx, expert_idx });
+        const down_info = loader.getTensorOffsetAndSize(down_name) orelse return error.TensorNotFound;
+        const down_buf = try engine.getOrCreateTensorBuffer(down_name, down_info.offset, down_info.size);
+
+        try engine.encodeExpertFFN_Q4_BufferFromSoftmax(
+            cmd_buf,
+            buf_normed,
+            gate_buf,
+            up_buf,
+            down_buf,
+            buf_output,
+            buf_expert_weights,
+            expert_idx,
+            n_embd,
+            n_ff,
+        );
+    }
+}
+
+/// Encode a complete MoE block (zero + experts + residual)
+///
+/// This is the standard pattern for VIP experts or speculative expert reuse.
+/// For router-based expert selection, use the router APIs separately.
+///
+/// After this call:
+/// - buf_output contains accumulated expert outputs
+/// - buf_residual contains: residual + MoE_output
+pub fn encodeMoEBlock(
+    engine: MoEEngine,
+    loader: TensorLoader,
+    cmd_buf: objc.MTLCommandBuffer,
+    params: MoEBlockParams,
+) !void {
+    // 1. Zero output accumulator
+    try engine.encodeZeroBuffer(cmd_buf, params.buf_output, params.n_embd);
+
+    // 2. Run top-2 experts
+    for (params.experts) |expert_idx| {
+        try encodeExpertWithAutoSource(
+            engine,
+            loader,
+            cmd_buf,
+            params.layer_idx,
+            expert_idx,
+            params.n_embd,
+            params.n_ff,
+            params.buf_normed,
+            params.buf_output,
+            params.buf_expert_weights,
+        );
+    }
+
+    // 3. MoE residual add
+    try engine.encodeAdd(cmd_buf, params.buf_residual, params.buf_output, params.buf_residual, params.n_embd);
+}
+
+/// Build MoEBlockParams from common engine buffers
+pub fn buildParams(
+    layer_idx: u32,
+    n_embd: u32,
+    n_ff: u32,
+    buf_normed: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_output: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_residual: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    buf_expert_weights: objc.MTLBuffer,
+    experts: [2]u32,
+) MoEBlockParams {
+    return MoEBlockParams{
+        .layer_idx = layer_idx,
+        .n_embd = n_embd,
+        .n_ff = n_ff,
+        .buf_normed = buf_normed,
+        .buf_output = buf_output,
+        .buf_residual = buf_residual,
+        .buf_expert_weights = buf_expert_weights,
+        .experts = experts,
+    };
+}
